episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 357: Magic the Gathering 2022 Year in Review Pt2
episode.description: James & Derek get you up to speed on the Metagame Week in Review for Modern and Pioneer, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and a continued look back at 2022 through the lens of Magic the Gathering, breaking down the best of Cards to watch from Cliff and the Pro Traders, as well as a quick chat about the cancelled MTG video games this week.
